popularStory.headline: William de Botreaux, 3rd Baron Botreaux (1389-1462)
popularStory.description: William de Botreaux, 3rd Baron Botreaux (1389-1462) was a prominent baron in Somerset and the south-west of England. He inherited from his father the barony by writ of Botreaux as well as substantial …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreaux於1389年2月20日出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親Sir William de Botreaux22歲，母親Elizabeth de Saint Lo26歲。他於1411年與Elizabeth de Beaumont在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1462年5月16日享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特諾斯 卡德波利。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreaux was born on 20 February 1389, in Somerset, England, his father, Sir William de Botreaux, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth de Saint Lo, was 26. He married Elizabeth de Beaumont in 1411, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1415. He died on 16 May 1462, at the age of 73, and was buried in North Cadbury, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreaux est né le 20 février 1389, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Botreaux, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Saint Lo, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Beaumont en 1411, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Il est décédé le 16 mai 1462, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à North Cadbury, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.North Cadbury, Somerset, England: North Cadbury, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreaux am 20. Februar 1389 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Botreaux 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Saint Lo 26. Er hat 1411 in England Elizabeth de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 16. Mai 1462 im Alter von 73 Jahren und wurde in North Cadbury, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth de Beaumont nel 1411, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Morì il 16 maggio 1462, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a North Cadbury, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreauxが1389年2月20日にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Sir William de Botreauxは22歳，母Elizabeth de Saint Loは26歳であった。1411年にイギリスでElizabeth de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1462年5月16日に73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトノース カドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreaux(이)가 1389년 2월 20일 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Botreaux(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Saint Lo(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1411년 영국에서 Elizabeth de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1462년 5월 16일 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 노르스 카드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreaux nasceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1389, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Botreaux, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Saint Lo, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Beaumont em 1411, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Ele faleceu em 16 de maio de 1462, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em North Cadbury, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Botreaux 3rd Baron Botreaux родился 20 февраля 1389 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Botreaux было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Saint Lo, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Beaumont в 1411 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 16 мая 1462 г. в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности норт кадбури, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Elizabeth de Beaumont en 1411, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió el 16 de mayo de 1462, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en North Cadbury, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
